Durable Mesh & Vinyl Fence Banners with Custom Printing & Professional Finishing PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Choose your fence banner material, size, and finishing options for professional construction site and outdoor display applications. PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Fence Banners for Construction Sites & Outdoor Installations

Fence banners are available in multiple durable materials designed for outdoor construction and event applications. We can print your custom fence banner in either our 8oz mesh material with 37% air-flow or in our heavy-duty 13oz and 18oz scrim vinyl materials for maximum durability and professional display.

Our custom fence banners are digitally printed in full color and can accommodate your logos, graphics, and text for construction site branding, event promotion, or perimeter advertising. Each fence banner is professionally finished with heat-welded hems and strategically placed grommets for secure installation on chain-link fencing and construction barriers.

Whether you need mesh fence banners for windy construction sites or solid vinyl fence wraps for maximum visibility, our materials are engineered to withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant print quality throughout extended installations.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fence Banner Materials for Outdoor Construction & Event Display

8oz Mesh Fence Banner Material

The mesh material is constructed from 8oz PVC polyester with 37% air-flow for wind resistance. The crisscrossed fiber construction creates a printable surface while allowing airflow, making it ideal for windy construction sites and outdoor installations where wind load is a concern.

Mesh fence banners maintain excellent graphic visibility while reducing wind stress on fence mounting points. Most commonly installed at construction sites, ball field perimeters, and outdoor event venues where both visibility and wind resistance are required.

Heavy-Duty Scrim Vinyl Fence Banner Materials

Vinyl fence banners are printed on high-quality 13oz or 18oz heavy-duty scrim vinyl banner material. The internal scrim weave provides exceptional strength and tear resistance for long-term outdoor installations.

Vinyl fence banners deliver maximum opacity and vibrant color reproduction for applications requiring complete visual coverage. The heavier gauge materials resist stretching and maintain dimensional stability throughout temperature fluctuations.

Material Variance Notice: Vinyl materials may experience up to 1/2 inch variance per linear foot due to temperature sensitivity during printing and installation. Contact our customer service team to discuss precision requirements for your specific application.

Need help selecting the right material for your installation? Request a sample packet of fence banner materials.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Finishing Options for Fence Banner Installation

All fence banners and wraps are professionally finished with heat-welded hems and strategically placed grommets for secure outdoor installation. Our heat-welding process folds the material edges and applies controlled heat until the banner material bonds permanently, creating reinforced edges that resist tearing and fraying during installation and wind exposure.

Grommet Placement for Chain-Link Installation

Grommets are placed every 2–4 feet around the perimeter of your fence banner, providing multiple secure attachment points for installation on chain-link fencing, construction barriers, and perimeter applications. The brass grommets resist corrosion and maintain holding strength throughout extended outdoor exposure.

Proper grommet spacing ensures your fence banner remains securely attached while allowing for natural material movement during wind exposure, preventing stress tears at mounting points.

Have questions about finishing options for your specific installation? Call (320) 391-5300 and our customer service team will help you select the optimal finishing configuration.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Fence Banner Production & Turnaround Times

1 Business Day Priority Production

Rush production available for urgent construction deadlines and immediate installation requirements.

2 Business Days Express Production

Fast-track production for time-sensitive projects and planned construction phases.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Standard production timeline for most fence banner projects and scheduled installations.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Economy production timeline for advance planning and non-urgent installation schedules.

Production times begin after artwork approval and payment processing. Complex designs or specialty finishing may require additional production time. Contact our team to discuss expedited options for your project timeline.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fence Banner Payment & Ordering Options

We accept multiple payment methods to accommodate both individual and commercial fence banner orders. Payment processing options include major credit cards, business accounts, and purchase order arrangements for qualified commercial customers.

Corporate accounts are available for construction companies, event management firms, and organizations with recurring fence banner requirements. Net payment terms and volume pricing are available for qualifying businesses.

Payment is processed upon order confirmation and artwork approval. Production begins immediately following payment verification to ensure your fence banners meet your installation timeline.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Fence Banner Delivery

Standard Shipping Methods

Fence banners are carefully packaged and shipped via ground transportation for most delivery locations. Expedited shipping options are available for time-critical construction projects and installation deadlines.

Large Format Shipping Considerations

Oversized fence banners may require freight shipping depending on dimensions and destination. Our shipping team will coordinate the most efficient delivery method for your specific banner size and installation location.

Shipping timeframes vary by destination and selected shipping method. Contact our customer service team for specific delivery estimates to your construction site or installation location.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installation Applications for Construction Fence Banners

Construction Site Perimeter Advertising

Transform construction site fencing into professional advertising space with custom fence banners featuring your company branding, project information, or promotional messaging.

Event Venue Perimeter Displays

Create branded event perimeters for festivals, tournaments, and outdoor gatherings with mesh or vinyl fence banners that withstand weather exposure while maintaining professional appearance.

Sports Facility Sponsor Displays

Install sponsor recognition and advertising displays on athletic field fencing, creating revenue opportunities while enhancing facility professional appearance.

Temporary Barrier Branding

Convert temporary construction barriers and crowd control fencing into branded displays for construction companies, event organizers, and facility managers.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fence Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Preferred File Formats

The optimal file format for fence banner printing is .eps converted to outlines. We also accept high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files with sufficient resolution for your banner dimensions.

Professional Design Assistance

Unsure about your file quality or design requirements? Our professional graphic design team can assist with artwork preparation, optimization, and creation to ensure your fence banner meets professional printing standards.

Artwork Proofing Process

Request an order proof to verify artwork placement, color accuracy, and text information before production begins. Your proof includes a low-resolution preview of your fence banner design with dimensional specifications for final approval.

Color Matching Services

Professional color matching services are available for brand compliance and consistency across multiple fence banner installations.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Fence Banners for Professional Installation

Ready to enhance your construction site, event venue, or facility perimeter with professional fence banners? Our streamlined ordering process makes it simple to create custom fence banners that meet your specific installation requirements and timeline.

Three Simple Ways to Get Started

Upload Your Print-Ready Design

Step 1: Select your fence banner material and dimensions using our online configurator

Step 2: Upload your print-ready artwork file directly from your computer

Professional Design Services Available

Step 1: Choose your preferred fence banner material and size specifications

Step 2: Upload your logo, images, or reference materials

Step 3: Provide detailed design instructions for our professional design team

Our fence banner specialists are available Monday–Friday 8AM–4PM CST to assist with material selection, artwork requirements, and installation planning. Call (320) 391-5300 for expert guidance on your fence banner project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are fence banners and fence wraps?

Fence banners are custom-printed displays designed for installation on chain-link fencing, construction barriers, and perimeter applications. Fence wraps provide complete coverage for branding, advertising, or privacy purposes on outdoor installations.

What's the difference between a fence banner and a fence wrap?

Fence banners typically refer to individual display sections, while fence wraps indicate complete perimeter coverage. Both utilize the same durable materials and professional finishing methods for secure outdoor installation.

What material are your fence banners made of?

We offer fence banners in 8oz mesh PVC polyester with 37% air-flow, plus 13oz and 18oz heavy-duty scrim vinyl materials. Each material is engineered for outdoor durability and professional appearance.

Mesh vs. vinyl fence banner: which is best for windy areas?

Mesh fence banners with 37% air-flow are specifically designed for windy installations, reducing wind load on mounting points while maintaining excellent graphic visibility. Vinyl works best in protected areas where maximum opacity is required.

Do mesh fence banners help with wind?

Yes, mesh fence banners allow 37% air-flow through the material, significantly reducing wind stress on both the banner and fence mounting points while maintaining professional graphic display quality.

Are fence banners available in full color?

All fence banner materials support full-color digital printing, including photographic images, gradients, and complex graphics with unlimited color combinations.

What are the most common fence banner sizes?

Popular fence banner dimensions include 3'x6', 4'x8', 5'x10', and 6'x12', though we accommodate any custom size requirements for your specific installation needs.

How large or small can my fence banner be?

We produce fence banners from small identification signs to large-scale perimeter installations covering hundreds of linear feet. Contact our team to discuss your specific dimension requirements.

What's the best viewing distance and letter size for fence banners?

Letter height should be approximately 1 inch per 10 feet of viewing distance. For roadside installations, minimum 6-inch letter height ensures readability from moving vehicles.

How are custom fence banners and wraps commonly used?

Primary applications include construction site branding, event perimeter displays, sports facility advertising, temporary barrier covering, and facility identification for both commercial and institutional installations.

What finishing options are best for banners on a chain-link fence?

Heat-welded hems with grommets every 2-4 feet provide optimal attachment points for chain-link installation. Ball bungees or zip ties work well for secure mounting without fence damage.

What are ball bungees, and why use them for fence banners?

Ball bungees are elastic cords with plastic balls that stretch through grommets for quick, secure fence banner installation. They allow natural movement during wind exposure while maintaining attachment strength.

How many grommets do I need, and how should they be spaced?

Standard grommet spacing is every 2-4 feet around the perimeter. Windy locations may benefit from closer spacing, while protected installations can use wider spacing for material cost savings.

How do I store a fence banner when it's not in use?

Roll fence banners loosely with printed side out, store in a dry location away from extreme temperatures. Avoid folding, which can create permanent creases in vinyl materials.

How do I remove wrinkles from a fence banner?

Light wrinkles often disappear during outdoor installation as material warms and stretches naturally. Persistent wrinkles can be reduced with careful heat application or professional steaming services.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
